feedback_text:

    Measurement spec: Schema reflects real billing system patterns (Stripe-informed, not academic)
    Evidence found: "currency": { "type": "string", "pattern": "^[A-Z]{3}$" }

  FIX 7: schema_extensibility.metadata_support (current: 50%, 2.4 pts at stake)

  FIX 8: schema_extensibility.versioning (current: 50%, 2.4 pts at stake)
